hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.json|*.jsonc) pnpm run check --write "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

files=$(git diff --name-only HEAD; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard); if [ -z "$files" ] || ! printf '%s\n' "$files" | grep -qv '\.md$'; then exit 0; fi; out=$(pnpm run check-types 2>&1); status=$?; if [ "$status" -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --arg reason "$out" '{decision:"block", reason: $reason}'; fi
